usage_rules.headings: Use Manrope for all headings. Use Space Grotesk ONLY for 'Phytocode' related terms and numbers.
usage_rules.body: DM Sans for all paragraphs and UI text.
usage_rules.text_balance: Use 'text-balance' class on all headings to prevent widows.

primary.description: Deep Jungle Green - Trust, Nature, Depth

accent.description: Bio-Tech Violet - Used ONLY for Phytocode section gradients and accents

highlight.description: Solar Orange - CTAs and high-priority alerts

layout_system.container: container mx-auto px-4 md:px-6 lg:px-8 max-w-7xl

grid_strategies.products: grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6
grid_strategies.bento_hero: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-12 gap-4 md:gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]

buttons.primary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-base font-semibold shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300
buttons.secondary: rounded-full px-8 py-6 border-2 border-primary/20 hover:border-primary hover:bg-primary/5 transition-all duration-300

cards.product: group relative overflow-hidden rounded-2xl bg-white border border-border/50 hover:border-secondary/50 transition-all duration-300 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
cards.feature: bg-white/50 backdrop-blur-md border border-white/20 rounded-3xl p-8 hover:bg-white/80 transition-colors
cards.phytocode_glass: bg-white/10 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/20 rounded-2xl text-white

components.inputs: rounded-xl border-border/50 bg-white/50 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/20 focus:border-primary transition-all h-12 px-4

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on solid backgrounds to reduce digital flatness.
visual_enhancers.shapes: Use organic, fluid shapes in backgrounds (blobs) for the 'Nature' sections, and sharp geometric grids for 'Science' sections.

assets.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with thin strokes (1.5px) for a scientific feel. Use 'Leaf', 'Sprout', 'FlaskConical', 'Dna', 'Microscope' icons.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js with the new color palette first. Install 'clsx' and 'tailwind-merge' if not present for utility classes.
2. TYPOGRAPHY: Import 'Manrope' (weights 400-800) and 'DM Sans' (weights 400-700) from Google Fonts in index.css.
3. NAVIGATION: Create a sticky 'Glass' navbar. It should be white/80 with backdrop-blur. Links should be Manrope font.
4. HERO SECTION: Split layout. Left: Big Bold Text + CTA. Right: Abstract composition of Drone + Plant + Science Overlay (Phytocode).
5. PHYTOCODE SECTION: This must be a DARK section (bg-primary) with glowing accents to stand out as the 'Core Tech'. Use the 'lab_science' image here with an overlay.
6. PRODUCTS: Use a clean grid. Cards should be white on the light grey background. Product images should have a subtle green tint on hover.
7. FORMS: Use Shadcn form components but style them with 'rounded-xl' and 'border-gray-200'. Focus state should be the Electric Lime ring.
8. ANIMATION: Add 'framer-motion' for scroll reveals. Elements should float up gently.
9. FOOTER: massive footprint. Dark Green background. Big typography.
universal_guidelines: Do not use default Shadcn radius (use rounded-2xl or rounded-3xl for a friendlier, organic feel).
Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all text.
Mobile First: Stack grids to 1 column on mobile, 2 on tablet, 4 on desktop.
